title: The Giant of Metropolis
writer: Sabatino Ciuffini, Ambrogio Molteni, Oreste Palella
actors: Gordon Mitchell, Bella Cortez, Roldano Lupi
plot: Muscleman Ohro travels to the sinful capital of Atlantis to rebuke its godlessness and hubris and becomes involved in the battle against its evil lord Yoh-tar and his hideous super-science schemes.
